description_long: This is a medium-sized, asymmetrical ceramic handbag with a rounded, organic form and a wide, open top. The exterior is decorated with a detailed botanical motif featuring brown leaf and branch patterns set against a cream background, accented by bold blue highlights. The handle is a single, curved piece of light-colored wood or bamboo, attached to the body with visible knots and loops, giving it a rustic, handcrafted appearance. The interior appears to be smooth and dark, likely glazed for durability and contrast. The surface finish is matte with a slightly rough texture, enhancing the naturalistic aesthetic. There are no visible brand logos or additional hardware, and the closure mechanism is absent, leaving the top open.
description: A ceramic handbag with a botanical leaf pattern, blue accents, and a curved wooden handle, featuring an open top and rustic, handcrafted details.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide, open mouth of the handbag and the central attachment of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detailed leaf and branch pattern, blue accents, and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the symmetrical botanical motif and the full width of the bag's body.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the organic shape, handle attachment, and the continuation of the leaf pattern.
attribute_strap_type: single curved wooden handle, short length, fixed, attached with visible knots at both ends
attribute_closure_mechanism: none; the top is open with no visible closure
attribute_decorative_elements: botanical leaf and branch motif, blue accent glaze, handle knots
attribute_pattern: botanical leaf and branch pattern with blue highlights
